helenIntro.title: Meet Helen
helenIntro.desc1: Helen is a seasoned macro/quantitative analyst with over 15 years of experience. She has served as Chief Analyst at multiple top investment institutions, specializing in global macroeconomic research, commodity analysis, and quantitative strategy development.
helenIntro.desc2: Her analytical framework integrates traditional macroeconomics, behavioral finance, and quantitative models, with deep research accumulation in gold, silver, crude oil and other commodities. Now, her experience and wisdom are available to every investor through her AI avatar.
